200.html:
data [required]

[object]

An array of dataset restriction objects, one for each configured product type.

attributes [required]

object

The current configuration of a dataset restriction, including restriction mode, ownership mode, and exempt principals.

ownership_mode

enum

Controls how dataset ownership is determined. disabled turns off ownership-based access entirely. team_tag_based assigns dataset ownership based on the team tags applied to the data, allowing team members to see their own team's datasets. Allowed enum values: disabled,team_tag_based

restriction_key

string

Internal key used by the restriction enforcement system to identify this restriction rule.

restriction_mode [required]

enum

Controls the default data visibility for the product type. standard makes data visible to all users with appropriate product access. default_hide hides data by default and requires explicit grants for each dataset. Allowed enum values: standard,default_hide

unrestricted_principals

[object]

Principals (users or roles) that are exempt from this restriction and retain full data access regardless of the restriction mode.

id [required]

string

The unique identifier of the principal (a user UUID or role ID).

name [required]

string

The human-readable display name of the principal as shown in the Datadog UI.

type [required]

string

The kind of principal, such as user for an individual user account or role for a Datadog role.

id [required]

string

The Datadog product type this restriction applies to (for example, rum, apm, or logs).

type [required]

enum

JSON:API resource type for dataset restrictions. Allowed enum values: dataset_restrictions

403.html:
errors [required]

[object]

A list of errors.

detail

string

A human-readable explanation specific to this occurrence of the error.

meta

object

Non-standard meta-information about the error

source

object

References to the source of the error.

header

string

A string indicating the name of a single request header which caused the error.

parameter

string

A string indicating which URI query parameter caused the error.

pointer

string

A JSON pointer to the value in the request document that caused the error.

status

string

Status code of the response.

title

string

Short human-readable summary of the error.

errors [required]

[string]

A list of errors.

200.html:
data [required]

object

A single dataset restriction configuration for one product type.

attributes [required]

object

The current configuration of a dataset restriction, including restriction mode, ownership mode, and exempt principals.

ownership_mode

enum

Controls how dataset ownership is determined. disabled turns off ownership-based access entirely. team_tag_based assigns dataset ownership based on the team tags applied to the data, allowing team members to see their own team's datasets. Allowed enum values: disabled,team_tag_based

restriction_key

string

Internal key used by the restriction enforcement system to identify this restriction rule.

restriction_mode [required]

enum

Controls the default data visibility for the product type. standard makes data visible to all users with appropriate product access. default_hide hides data by default and requires explicit grants for each dataset. Allowed enum values: standard,default_hide

unrestricted_principals

[object]

Principals (users or roles) that are exempt from this restriction and retain full data access regardless of the restriction mode.

id [required]

string

The unique identifier of the principal (a user UUID or role ID).

name [required]

string

The human-readable display name of the principal as shown in the Datadog UI.

type [required]

string

The kind of principal, such as user for an individual user account or role for a Datadog role.

id [required]

string

The Datadog product type this restriction applies to (for example, rum, apm, or logs).

type [required]

enum

JSON:API resource type for dataset restrictions. Allowed enum values: dataset_restrictions

429.html:
errors [required]

[string]

A list of errors.

request.html:
data [required]

object

Data object for a dataset restriction update.

attributes [required]

object

Editable attributes of a dataset restriction. Only restriction_mode is required; omitted optional fields retain their current values.

ownership_mode

enum

Controls how dataset ownership is determined. disabled turns off ownership-based access entirely. team_tag_based assigns dataset ownership based on the team tags applied to the data, allowing team members to see their own team's datasets. Allowed enum values: disabled,team_tag_based

restriction_mode [required]

enum

Controls the default data visibility for the product type. standard makes data visible to all users with appropriate product access. default_hide hides data by default and requires explicit grants for each dataset. Allowed enum values: standard,default_hide

unrestricted_principals

[string]

Principal identifiers (users or roles) that are exempt from the restriction and can always access all datasets for this product type.

type [required]

enum

JSON:API resource type for dataset restrictions. Allowed enum values: dataset_restrictions
